Class EdnaOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
de.kleinert.edna.EdnaOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
EdnaOptions
public static final class EdnaOptions.Builder extends Object
A builder class for EdnaOptions. This class should be exclusively used in EdnaOptions.copy(UnaryOperator) and not be directly created by the user.
